zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Winslow於1439年出生在英國奧可福爾貝布洛可時，她的父親William Winslow33歲，母親Agnes Throgmorton41歲。她於1460年與John Giffard Esq在英國巴金哈姆爾特易福德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1534年3月12日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾享年95歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Winslow于1439年出生在英国奧可福爾貝布洛可时，她的父亲William Winslow33岁，母亲Agnes Throgmorton41岁。她于1460年与John Giffard Esq在英国巴金哈姆爾特易福德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1534年3月12日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: Winslow
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Winslow in Buckinghamshire. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wine (genitive Wines) + Old English hlāw ‘mound, hill’.

History: Edward Winslow (1595–1655), one of the founders of the Plymouth Colony who sailed on the Mayflower in 1620, was born in Droitwich, Worcestershire, England. He was a governor of the colony and also served as agent of the Massachusetts Bay Company in France. In 1621 he married Susanna, the widow of William White, the first marriage in New England. Their son Josiah (c. 1629–80) was governor of Plymouth Colony from 1673 to 1680, the first native-born governor in North America. He had numerous prominent descendents.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Winslow was born in 1439, in Begbroke, Oxfordshire, England, her father, William Winslow, was 33 and her mother, Agnes Throgmorton, was 41. She married John Giffard Esq in 1460, in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 12 March 1534, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Winslow est née en 1439, à Begbroke, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Winslow, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Agnes Throgmorton, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé John Giffard Esq en 1460, à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 12 mars 1534, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 95 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Winslowが1439年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアベグブロクで生まれた時，父William Winslowは33歳，母Agnes Throgmortonは41歳であった。1460年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードでJohn Giffard Esqと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1534年3月12日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Winslow(이)가 1439년 영국 스퍼드실르 베그브로크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Winslow(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Throgmorton(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1460년 영국 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 John Giffard Esq(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1534년 3월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Winslow родилась в 1439 г. в местности бегброк, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Winslow было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Throgmorton, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Giffard Esq в 1460 г. в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 12 марта 1534 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 95 лет.
